## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      4 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Mar 24, 2026 - Jun 19, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Dana C._, Jun 19, 2026, 1/5: "App crashes constantly"
            2. _Heather Kemper_, Jun 5, 2026, 1/5: "App keeps crashing. Impossible to cancel before free trial expires."
            3. _Melissa Page_, Apr 23, 2026, 1/5: "keeps crashing on me. This is my first time trying to use it and it won't stay open. Update- DO NOT DOWNLOAD THIS APP. IT'S A FRAUD! I cannot use it, it crashes any time I try to do anything. I can't manage my subscription through the app. can't cancel my subscription through Google subscriptions, and I reached out for support and they basically told me they couldn't help me, I had to cancel it through Google subscriptions. I'm beyond irritated."
